input persona: A video game designer focused on creating MOBA games, interested in understanding the mechanics and balance of character skills.
synthesized text:
Can you review and provide feedback on the following character concept for my upcoming MOBA game?

Character Name: "Echo, the Chronal Assassin"
Role: Assassin/Mage
Skills:

* Q: Time Warp - Echo blinks to a target location, dealing 60/80/100/120 (+0.6 bonus attack damage) physical damage to all enemies within a small radius. Cooldown: 1.2 seconds.
* W: Chronal Acceleration - Echo's attack speed is increased by 20/25/30% for 2.5 seconds. During this time, her attacks also apply a stacking slow that reduces enemy movement speed by 10/15/20% for 1.5 seconds. Cooldown: 2.5 seconds.
* E: Temporal Loop - Echo creates a temporal loop, dealing 40/60/80 (+0.4 bonus attack damage) physical damage to all enemies within a medium radius. The loop lasts for 2 seconds, and enemies caught in it are slowed by 20/30/40% for 1.5 seconds. Cooldown: 3.5 seconds.
* R: Paradox - Echo creates a localized distortion in time, stunning all enemies within a large radius for 1.5 seconds. During this time, Echo's attack speed is increased by 50%, and her attacks deal an additional 20/30/40 (+0.2 bonus attack damage) physical damage. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

I'm looking for feedback on the balance and synergy of Echo's skills, as well as suggestions for potential changes or additions to her kit.
label: instruction
